[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 101111111 8
4 001111101 6
5 111110110 7
6 111111011 8
7 110110111 7

01 10 110001110 5
12 21 000001011 3
23 32 011001100 4
34 43 001001000 2
45 54 001101101 5
56 65 101100111 6
67 76 101110100 5
70 07 101111111 8 match 3

02 20 110000101 4
13 31 011000111 5
24 42 010000100 2
35 53 000100101 3
46 64 100001010 3
57 75 000010011 3
60 06 000001011 3
71 17 011110001 5

03 30 101001001 4
14 41 010001111 5
25 52 011101001 5
36 63 101000010 3
47 74 001111110 6
50 05 101101100 5
61 16 110000101 4
72 27 011111010 6

04 40 100000001 2
15 51 011100010 4
26 62 110001110 5
37 73 000110110 4
[completion]
